content: On latest canary (origin/canary a6cb200d5b), mobileRouter.config.tsx was missing the path route for agent topic pages. Added a mobile route under /agent/:aid for path :topicId that reuses @/routes/(mobile)/chat, so /agent/:aid/:topicId is registered and ChatHydration can consume params.topicId.

User said permissions should now work. Fetched origin/canary, switched to canary, fast-forwarded to latest, confirmed mobile router still lacked /agent/:aid/:topicId while desktop had /agent/:aid/:topicId, and patched mobileRouter.config.tsx. Targeted Vitest could not run because dependencies vite-tsconfig-paths and vitest/config were missing in the local install.
